*** CTOWORD
*** Combierte un buffer en un número
LPARAMETER cBuffer
RETURN ASC(SUBSTR(cBuffer,1,1)) + ASC(SUBSTR(cBuffer,2,1))*256 + ASC(SUBSTR(cBuffer,3,1))*65536 + ASC(SUBSTR(cBuffer,4,1))*16777216

Lparameters pStep, pTotal, pMessage

With ThisForm.FileControl

	If Type('pMessage') = 'C'
		.StatusText = pMessage
	EndIf

	Do Case
		Case Type('pStep') = 'N'
			If .StatusPercent < Int( (pStep / pTotal) * 100 )
				.StatusPercent = Int( (pStep / pTotal) * 100 )
			EndIf
			Return (pStep + 1)
		
		Case Type('pStep') = 'L'
			.StatusPercent = 0
			.Visible       = pStep
	EndCase

EndWith

*-[ Cursor do Log ]-*
sele 0
Create cursor Logftp (memo C(254), cor C(1))
*-[ Cursor do progresso ]-*
sele 0
Create cursor tmpprog (file C(254), Size N(12), Local C(254), Host C(254), Status C(50) )

if ThisForm._TpConnect = "D" && Dial-UP
   PUBLIC ARRAY aAtivas(1)
 
   nAtivas = ThisForm.RasAtivas("aAtivas")
   IF nAtivas > 0
      =MessageBox("A conexăo ŕ internet ainda está ativa...",0+64,"Atençăo") 
      IF !IsEmpty(cProvedor)
         cRun = "RUN /N Rundll Rnaui.dll,RnaDial " + ALLTRIM(cProvedor)
        &cRun.
      ENDIF   
   ENDIF
   Release aAtivas
Endif   
Release aAtivas, cProvedor, aProvedor
if used("logftp") 
   sele logftp
   use
endif   
if used("tmpprog") 
   sele tmpprog
